message:
fix(windows): add stub for createFIFO on Windows

FIFO/named pipes are Unix-specific and tmux is Unix-only,
so Windows builds should compile but will error at runtime
if this code path is reached.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+//go:build windows
+
+package tmux
+
+import "errors"
+
+// createFIFO is not supported on Windows.
+// Named pipes on Windows use a different API (CreateNamedPipe).
+// Since tmux is Unix-only, this functionality is not available on Windows.
+func createFIFO(path string) error {
+	return errors.New("FIFO/named pipes not supported on Windows (tmux is Unix-only)")
+}
